rationale: Refactored the task-create fetch mock to use a path-based switch while preserving the delayed /api/executions response behavior.
Broad review summary duplicated the actionable inline mock-refactor feedback and did not request a separate code change.
Added explicit fill=none, stroke=currentColor, strokeWidth=2, strokeLinecap/Join=round attributes to ProvidersKeyIcon SVG.
Added explicit fill=none, stroke=currentColor, strokeWidth=2, strokeLinecap/Join=round attributes to UserWorkspaceIcon SVG.
Added explicit fill=none, stroke=currentColor, strokeWidth=2, strokeLinecap/Join=round attributes to OperationsGearIcon SVG.

Renamed the settings nav classes to settings-nav-* (settings-nav-field/options/option/option-icon/option-label) and added matching CSS selectors that share rules with the existing queue-step-type-* styles, so the settings page no longer leaks the queue-step-type abstraction.
Summary review comment recapping the inline review comments; no separate action required since each underlying item is addressed.
Changed the blocked-outcome skip call to use the completed node's zero-based index so only downstream nodes are marked skipped and the completed node remains succeeded.
Updated the fenced JSON regex to capture full code fence content instead of a non-greedy object fragment, preserving nested JSON objects.
Updated fenced-content extraction to append only content that is a complete JSON object before calling json.loads.
Broad review summary; the actionable inline findings from this review were handled individually.
Guarded the blocked-outcome short-circuit behind a replay-stable workflow.patched marker.
Made link-type matching strict when Jira provides a type name, so configured non-Blocks link types do not classify Blocks links as blockers.
Automated review metadata without an actionable code request.
